response.justification: Strong technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and Linux/open-source ecosystems with demonstrated initiative (founding GISCollective, DLang OSS contributions, workshops). However, the role is explicitly a leadership/Head of Development position requiring team mentorship, architectural ownership, UML proficiency, and German at C1 minimum — the resume shows individual-contributor roles throughout with no formal lead/management experience, no UML mention, and only basic German, which is a hard blocker for a German-speaking executive-level role.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux/Unix background with founder experience on a production GIS platform
Broad polyglot architecture experience across Node, TypeScript, DLang, C/C++, and microservices at scale
Demonstrated mentorship via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course delivery
concerns: German at basic level fails the C1 minimum requirement
No formal team-lead or Head-of-Development title; career is IC-focused
UML, requirements management, and formal IT architecture/compliance experience not evidenced

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership/management track record
